name: Implementation
prose: Write code between scaffold comments. Implementation agents may only create or modify files that exist in the scaffold tree. Implement tests alongside production code, not after. Follow the pattern registry for every cross-cutting concern.

items.text: Implementation agents may only create or modify files that exist in the scaffold tree.
Implement tests alongside production code, not after.
Follow the pattern registry for every cross-cutting concern.

cross_refs.text: PP-DECOUPLE-1 through PP-DECOUPLE-5 (no train wrecks, Tell Don't Ask, Demeter, interfaces over inheritance, config externalized)
IC-SCALE-1 through IC-SCALE-4 (10x/100x/1000x, timeouts, streaming, assumptions documented)
IC-DATA-1 through IC-DATA-5 (schema validation at boundaries)
